name: Ginger- Molasses Muffins
recipeInstructions:
(Makes about 40 muffins.)
Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease 2-inch muffin tins.
Dissolve baking soda in hot water. Cream butter with sugar until light and fluffy, using an electric mixer.
Blend in molasses, yolks, and baking soda. Combine flour, nutmeg, cinnamon, and ginger. Mix into the butter alternately with buttermilk in three additions each. Fold in nuts and raisins. Beat whites with cream of tartar until stiff but not dry. Fold into batter.
Spoon batter into prepared tins, filling 3/4 full. Bake until a tester inserted in the center comes out clean, 20 to 25 minutes. Transfer muffins to racks. (Can be prepared up to one day ahead. Reheat in a 350°F oven for about 4 minutes.)
Serve warm.
